title: Incompatible re-declaration of wire
code_blocks:
Yosys 0.5+     393 (git sha1 fd3e10c, clang 7.0.0 -fPIC -Os)

yosys> read_verilog bug_1.v 
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `bug_1.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\test'.
ERROR: Incompatible re-declaration of wire $func$\muxer$bug_1.v:19$2$\size at bug_1.v:2.
